name: Spaghetti Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Olive oil (Use ingredients at room temperature.)
recipeInstructions:
"With the powerful flavors of parmesan cheese, Italian seasoning and olive oil, this is the perfect companion or main course for Italian dinners with or without spaghetti."
1. Preheat your bread machine to white bread setting.
2. Add all ingredients into the bread machine in the order listed.
3. Select white bread and push start.
